merge.mode.videoJoin.timelineHintText: Video join mode is active. Only video clips can be added to the video track.
merge.mode.videoJoin.videoTrackEmptyText: Click a video file in the media list to add it to the video track.
merge.mode.videoJoin.audioTrackEmptyText: This mode focuses on video joining, so the audio track is not part of the arrangement.
merge.mode.videoJoin.rejectAudioInputMes: Video join mode is active. Choose a video clip for the video track.
merge.mode.audioJoin.timelineHintText: Audio join mode is active. Only audio clips can be added to the audio track.
merge.mode.audioJoin.videoTrackEmptyText: This mode focuses on audio joining, so the video track is not part of the arrangement.
merge.mode.audioJoin.audioTrackEmptyText: Click an audio file in the media list to add it to the audio track.
merge.mode.audioJoin.rejectVideoInputMes: Audio join mode is active. Choose an audio clip for the audio track.
merge.mode.audioVideoCompose.timelineHin: Audio-video compose mode is active. Add one video and one audio file separately.
merge.mode.audioVideoCompose.videoTrackE: Click a video file in the media list to place it on the video track. Adding another one replaces the current video automatically.
merge.mode.audioVideoCompose.audioTrackE: Click an audio file in the media list to place it on the audio track. Adding another one replaces the current audio automatically.
merge.page.mediaLibrary.title: Media library
merge.page.mediaLibrary.description: Import video or audio files here. Click an item in the media list to add it to the corresponding track.
merge.page.workspace.title: Merge workspace
merge.page.workspace.description: Switch between merge modes and arrange clips onto the video track or audio track as needed.
merge.page.track.video.title: Video track
merge.page.track.audio.title: Audio track
merge.page.track.videoJoinOperationHint: Drag clips with the left mouse button to reorder them, or use the clip-top buttons to remove them quickly or set the resolution preset.
merge.page.audioVideoCompose.videoExtend: How to extend a shorter video
merge.page.output.title: Output settings
merge.page.output.field.mixOriginalAudio: Keep the original video audio and mix it with the imported audio
merge.page.output.option.extendFreeze: Freeze the last frame until the audio ends
merge.page.output.description.balancedMo: Does not lock onto a single preset audio clip. The app normalizes sample rate and bitrate across all valid audio tracks, favoring stable listening and output compatibility.
merge.page.output.description.presetMode: Uses the selected parameter preset on the audio track as the target. Audio below the target is raised to it, audio above it is reduced, and matching clips remain unchanged.
merge.page.output.description.importedAu: Adjust the overall imported-audio volume here. The selected dB value is applied directly during export.
merge.page.action.setVideoDurationPreset: Set as the video duration preset
merge.page.action.setAudioDurationPreset: Set as the audio duration preset
merge.page.dragDrop.caption: Drop files or folders here to import media
merge.page.item.sourceUnavailable: This media item was removed from the library and will not be included in the current merge.
merge.summary.videoResolutionPreset.empt: After you add video clips, the first available video will be used as the default resolution preset.
merge.summary.videoResolutionPreset.unav: There is currently no available video clip that can be used as the resolution preset.
merge.summary.videoResolutionPreset.auto: The first available video is currently used as the default resolution preset: {name}
merge.summary.audioParameterPreset.balan: Balanced mode is active. After you add audio clips, parameters will be normalized across all available tracks automatically.
Balanced mode is active: no manual preset is used, and the expected output is {summary}.
merge.summary.audioParameterPreset.prese: After you add audio clips, the first available audio clip will be used as the default parameter preset.
There is currently no available audio clip that can be used as the parameter preset.
Current audio parameter preset: {name} · Target output {summary}.
The first available audio clip is currently used as the default parameter preset: {name} · Target output {summary}.
merge.audioVideoCompose.fadeHint.empty: After you add one complete video and one complete audio clip, fade-in and fade-out durations are limited automatically by the target output duration.
merge.audioVideoCompose.fadeHint.value: The current target output duration is {duration}. Fade-in and fade-out durations are limited automatically within that range.
In Audio-video compose mode, place one video and one audio clip on their tracks. Adding another clip of the same type replaces the current track content automatically.
Video {videoDuration}, audio {audioDuration}. Choose which track should drive the output duration.
Video {videoDuration}, audio {audioDuration}. Their durations are already naturally aligned.
Audio-video compose mode does not provide a detailed timeline. It focuses on smart alignment and export for one video plus one audio clip.
No extra trimming or extension is needed. The export uses the original video and aligns the imported audio directly.
Video is the reference: imported audio is trimmed automatically to the video duration.
Video is the reference: imported audio is looped to match the video duration, and the final loop keeps only the required portion.
Audio is the reference: the video is trimmed automatically to the audio duration.
Audio is the reference: the video is looped to match the audio duration.
Audio is the reference: the video is extended by freezing the last frame to match the audio duration.
merge.audioVideoCompose.videoTrackSummar: After you add one video from the media list, this track handles the visual output and original-video audio mixing.
The current video has usable original audio, so it can be mixed with the imported audio if needed.
The current video has no usable original audio, so the export uses only the imported audio.
merge.audioVideoCompose.audioTrackSummar: After you add one audio clip from the media list, this track handles music, narration, and other imported audio.
The imported audio can be adjusted on the right with volume, fade-in, fade-out, and mix strategy controls.
merge.audioVideoCompose.videoCardStrateg: The video track keeps only one clip. Adding another video replaces the current one automatically.
The current video is used as the only visual source in the export.
The current video duration already matches the audio, so no extra extension or trimming is required.
The current video is the duration preset, so the full picture is preserved until the export ends.
The current video is longer than the audio, so it is trimmed automatically to the audio duration during export.
The current video is shorter than the audio, so it is looped until the audio duration is satisfied during export.
The current video is shorter than the audio, so the last frame is frozen until the audio duration is satisfied during export.
merge.audioVideoCompose.audioCardStrateg: The audio track keeps only one clip. Adding another audio clip replaces the current one automatically.
The imported audio participates in the composition as the primary output audio track.
The current audio duration already matches the video, so it can be exported at its original length directly.
The current audio is the duration preset, so it is preserved in full until the export ends.
The current audio is longer than the video, so the imported audio is trimmed automatically to the video duration during export.
The current audio is shorter than the video, so it is looped to the video duration, and the final loop keeps only the required portion.
After you add a video or audio clip, mixing can be enabled according to the currently available audio sources.
Imported audio and original video audio are both available right now, so you can enable mixing and adjust both volumes as needed.
Imported audio is already available. If the source video has no original audio, the export uses only the imported audio.
The current video has usable original audio. Add imported audio to mix it together with the original track.
merge.progress.videoJoin.preparing: Inspecting video clips and preparing export parameters...
merge.progress.audioJoin.preparing: Inspecting audio clips and preparing export parameters...
merge.progress.audioVideoCompose.prepari: Inspecting audio and video sources and preparing composition parameters...
merge.status.initial: Import video or audio clips first, then add them to the corresponding tracks.
merge.status.processingLocked.moduleOper: A {module} task is currently running. Cancel it before you {operation}.
merge.status.trackAdded.video: {fileName} was added to the video track.
merge.status.trackAdded.audio: {fileName} was added to the audio track.
merge.status.mediaRemoved: {fileName} was removed from the media list.
merge.status.invalidTrackItems.title: Track clips were marked unavailable
merge.status.invalidTrackItems.message: Detected {count} track clips whose source media was removed from the media list. The affected clips were marked unavailable and will not be included in the current merge output. Re-add the source media or remove the unavailable clips from the track.
merge.status.videoTrackRemoved.default: {fileName} was removed from the video track.
merge.status.videoTrackRemoved.withFallb: {fileName} was removed from the video track, and the resolution preset switched to {presetName}.
merge.status.videoResolutionPreset.unava: The source media referenced by the current clip is unavailable and cannot be used as the resolution preset.
merge.status.audioTrackRemoved.default: {fileName} was removed from the audio track.
merge.status.audioTrackRemoved.withFallb: {fileName} was removed from the audio track, and the parameter preset switched to {presetName}.
merge.status.audioParameterPreset.balanc: Balanced mode is active, so manual parameter presets are not available.
merge.status.audioParameterPreset.unavai: The source media referenced by the current clip is unavailable and cannot be used as the parameter preset.
merge.status.audioParameterPreset.update: {name} is now the audio parameter preset.
merge.status.audioParameterMode.preset: Preset mode is active. You can choose one audio clip on the track as the parameter preset.
merge.status.audioParameterMode.balanced: Balanced mode is active. The system will normalize parameters across all available audio tracks automatically.
merge.status.videoResolutionStrategy.sma: Smaller-resolution videos will pad with black bars by default.
Smaller-resolution videos will stretch to fill by default.
merge.status.videoResolutionStrategy.lar: Larger-resolution videos will be squeezed to the preset resolution by default.
Larger-resolution videos will be cropped to the preset resolution by default.
merge.status.videoJoin.cannotStart.inval: Start processing is only available in Video join mode right now.
merge.status.videoJoin.cannotStart.proce: A Video join task is already running.
merge.status.videoJoin.cannotStart.unsup: Video join output is not supported in the current environment.
merge.status.videoJoin.cannotStart.missi: Add at least one valid video clip to the video track first.
merge.status.audioJoin.cannotStart.inval: Start processing is only available in Audio join mode right now.
merge.status.audioJoin.cannotStart.proce: An Audio join task is already running.
merge.status.audioJoin.cannotStart.unsup: Audio join output is not supported in the current environment.
merge.status.audioJoin.cannotStart.missi: Add at least one valid audio clip to the audio track first.
merge.status.audioJoin.completed.withPre: Audio join completed: {fileName}. Parameter preset source: {presetName} · {summary}.
merge.status.audioJoin.completed.balance: Audio join completed: {fileName}. Current mode: Balanced · {summary}.
merge.status.audioVideoCompose.cannotSta: Start processing is only available in Audio-video compose mode right now.
A merge task is already running.
Audio-video compose output is not supported in the current environment.
Add one valid video to the video track first.
Add one valid audio clip to the audio track first.
Audio-video compose is missing usable source media.
merge.status.audioVideoCompose.videoPres: The current video source is unavailable and cannot be used as the duration preset.
merge.status.audioVideoCompose.audioPres: The current audio source is unavailable and cannot be used as the duration preset.
merge.status.audioVideoCompose.reference: Video is now the reference, and the imported audio will match the video duration automatically.
The current video is now the duration preset.
Audio is now the reference, and the video will match the audio duration automatically with the current strategy.
The current audio is now the duration preset.
merge.status.audioVideoCompose.trackAdde: {fileName} was added to the video track.
{fileName} was added to the audio track.
merge.status.audioVideoCompose.reference: Add media to the Audio-video compose tracks before switching the preset reference.
Add media to the Audio-video compose tracks before selecting the preset reference.
merge.status.audioVideoCompose.extendMod: When the video is shorter, it will be extended by looping to the audio duration.
When the video is shorter, it will be extended by freezing the last frame to the audio duration.
merge.status.audioVideoCompose.videoTrac: {fileName} was removed from the Audio-video compose video track.
merge.status.audioVideoCompose.audioTrac: {fileName} was removed from the Audio-video compose audio track.
merge.status.audioVideoCompose.mixOrigin: There is currently no usable audio source for mixing. Add a video with audio or import an audio clip first.
Original video audio mixing was enabled.
Mixing was enabled, and the export will continue to use the imported audio as the main source.
Original video audio mixing was disabled, so the export keeps only the imported audio.
merge.dialog.importFiles.title: Import files
merge.dialog.outputDirectory.title: Choose output folder
merge.summary.outputDirectoryHint.videoJ: By default, the output uses the folder of the current preset source. After you set a folder, results are written there consistently.
merge.summary.outputDirectoryHint.audioV: By default, the output follows the current video source folder. After you set a folder, Audio-video compose results are written there consistently.
merge.summary.outputNameHint.default: If left empty, the output defaults to {fileName}. If the target folder already contains a file with the same name, the app appends a number automatically to avoid overwriting it.
merge.summary.outputNameHint.custom: The output will be named {fileName}. If the target folder already contains a file with the same name, the app appends a number automatically to avoid overwriting it.
merge.summary.audioTrackOperationHint.pr: Drag clips with the left mouse button to reorder them, or use the clip-top buttons to remove them quickly or set a parameter preset.
merge.summary.audioTrackOperationHint.ba: Drag clips with the left mouse button to reorder them, or use the clip-top buttons to remove them quickly. Balanced mode does not support manual parameter presets.
merge.summary.audioParameterModeHint.pre: Preset mode locks the sample rate and target bitrate of the current preset clip: audio below the target is raised to it, audio above it is reduced, and matching clips stay unchanged. If {format} does not support a fixed bitrate, the app prioritizes the sample rate and stays as close to the target bitrate as possible.
merge.summary.audioParameterModeHint.bal: Balanced mode does not lock a single preset clip. The app normalizes all valid tracks to the most common sample rate and bitrate, then quantizes them according to the encoding rules of {format}, so the displayed kHz / kbps values after re-import may not exactly match any original track.
merge.status.failure.noReadableMessage: FFmpeg did not return a readable error message.
merge.status.import.failed: Importing media failed. Please try again later.
merge.status.import.filePicker.unsupport: The current environment does not support opening the file picker.
merge.status.import.filePicker.completed: Imported {count} clips. The list keeps the import order.
Imported {count} clips. {duplicateCount} duplicate files were skipped.
merge.status.import.filePicker.skipped.d: The selected files are already in the media list.
merge.status.import.filePicker.failed: Importing files failed. Please try again later.
merge.status.outputDirectory.picker.unsu: The current environment does not support opening the folder picker.
merge.status.outputDirectory.selection.c: Choosing the output folder was cancelled.
merge.status.outputDirectory.selection.f: Choosing the output folder failed. Please try again later.
merge.status.outputDirectory.videoJoin.u: The Video join output folder was set to: {path}
merge.status.outputDirectory.videoJoin.c: The Video join output folder was cleared. Processing will fall back to the resolution preset video's folder.
merge.status.outputDirectory.audioJoin.u: The Audio join output folder was set to: {path}
merge.status.outputDirectory.audioJoin.c: The Audio join output folder was cleared. Processing will fall back to the current audio anchor source folder.
merge.status.outputDirectory.audioVideoC: The Audio-video compose output folder was set to: {path}
The Audio-video compose output folder was cleared. Processing will fall back to the current video source folder.
merge.status.transcoding.videoJoin.compa: The source clips do not fully match, or the workflow needs unified resolution, frame rate, or audio parameters, so this run fell back to compatible transcoding.
merge.status.transcoding.videoJoin.autoF: The source clips could not fully reuse the original streams, so this run automatically fell back to compatible transcoding.
merge.status.transcoding.audioJoin.compa: The source clips do not fully match, or the workflow needs unified sample rate or channel layout, so this run fell back to compatible audio transcoding.
merge.status.transcoding.audioJoin.autoF: The source clips could not fully reuse the original audio streams, so this run automatically fell back to compatible audio transcoding.
merge.status.transcoding.audioVideoCompo: The workflow could not fully reuse the original video stream, so this run will fall back to compatible transcoding.
The workflow could not fully reuse the original video stream, so this run automatically fell back to compatible transcoding.
merge.status.transcoding.gpuFallback: GPU encoding failed, so the app automatically fell back to CPU and retried once.
merge.status.videoJoin.outputFormat.chan: Video join output format switched to {format}.
merge.status.videoJoin.runtimeReady: FFmpeg is ready. Joining {count} video clips...
merge.status.videoJoin.completed: Video join completed: {fileName}. Resolution preset source: {presetName} · {resolution}; smaller-resolution video: {smallerStrategy}; larger-resolution video: {largerStrategy}.
merge.status.videoJoin.completed.withTra: Video join completed: {fileName}. Resolution preset source: {presetName} · {resolution}; smaller-resolution video: {smallerStrategy}; larger-resolution video: {largerStrategy}. {transcoding}
merge.status.audioJoin.outputFormat.chan: Audio join output format switched to {format}.
merge.status.audioJoin.runtimeReady: FFmpeg is ready. Joining {count} audio clips...
merge.status.audioJoin.completed.withPre: Audio join completed: {fileName}. Parameter preset source: {presetName} · {summary}. {transcoding}
merge.status.audioJoin.completed.balance: Audio join completed: {fileName}. Current mode: Balanced · {summary}. {transcoding}
merge.status.audioVideoCompose.outputFor: Audio-video compose output format switched to {format}.
merge.status.audioVideoCompose.runtimeRe: FFmpeg is ready. Composing audio and video: {duration}
merge.status.audioVideoCompose.trackUnav: The current video-track source is unavailable. Remove it and add it again.
The current audio-track source is unavailable. Remove it and add it again.
merge.status.audioVideoCompose.completed: Video was the reference, and the imported audio was trimmed automatically to the video duration
Video was the reference, and the imported audio was looped to the video duration
Audio was the reference, and the video was trimmed automatically to the audio duration
Audio was the reference, and the video was looped to the audio duration
Audio was the reference, and the video was extended by freezing the last frame to the audio duration
Audio and video were naturally aligned at their original durations
Original video audio was kept in the mix (original video {originalVolume} / imported audio {importedVolume})
Only the imported audio was used ({importedVolume})
